title: SpaceX Criticizes EU Proposal for Satellite Spectrum Tender
description: SpaceX criticized the European Union’s plans for the distribution of satellite spectrum, a key element in the growth plans for the Elon Musk-led company’s Starlink service following its record-setting initial public offering.

title: SevenRooms CEO on New Reservation Organizing Platform
description: Joel Montaniel, Co-Founder and CEO of SevenRooms, discussed the company's new platform, Channel Connect, which aims to simplify reservation management for restaurants by consolidating bookings from multiple channels into a single system. Unlike the hotel industry, where centralized booking systems are common, restaurants currently manage reservations across various apps and platforms, often using multiple devices, creating operational challenges. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Candle’s Mayer Says Ad-Backed Streaming ‘Snuck Up’ on Industry
description: Fox Corp.’s $22 billion acquisition of Roku Inc. illustrates how free-to-watch, ad-supported streaming services are becoming a major force in the entertainment industry, according to Candle Media Inc. co-Chief Executive Officer Kevin Mayer.
